work_unit: local_simulator/api.py — redact LLM api_key from /agent/state/full + /agent/settings GET/POST responses
situation: audit-2026-07-07-029 MONI-PY-005 (HIGH): engine.config 含 llm.api_key 明文，被 /agent/state/full (line 1340) 与 /agent/settings GET (line 1347→engine.get_runtime_settings→line 138 return self.config) 直接返回给任意调用方。POST /agent/settings (line 1382) 也通过 update_runtime_settings 返回值泄漏。无鉴权下等同公开密钥。
action: 在 api.py 顶层加 _redact_config_for_api(cfg) helper：深拷贝后按 SENSITIVE_KEYS={api_key,secret,password,token,credential,private_key} 子串匹配 mask 为 ***REDACTED***（递归遍历 dict/list）。三处 endpoint 改用该 helper 包装响应：GET /agent/state/full 的 settings 字段、GET /agent/settings、POST /agent/settings。Helper 集中化便于后续扩展敏感字段清单，避免散点式遗漏。
outcome_evidence: commit 1f030f4 on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870; pushed to origin; grep confirms _redact_config_for_api defined at line 25 and referenced at lines 1369/1376/1383. direction_kind=route-fix (api.py not in .claude/public-interfaces.txt); reused existing opt-local_simulator worktree per area-match rule.
next_suggestion: 派生 MONI-PY-001 (H, SSRF via LLM chat proxy base_url) — 下一轮 fix-in-progress 优先
派生 MONI-PY-002 (M, unbounded backtest frames DoS)
派生 MONI-PY-003 (M, sync WFO blocking async loop)
派生 MONI-PY-004 (M, agent action whitelist bypass kwargs)

audit_findings.finding: /agent/state/full returns raw engine.config including llm.api_key plaintext
/agent/settings GET returns engine.get_runtime_settings() which is raw self.config
POST /agent/settings leaks config via update_runtime_settings return value
